tender.title: Framework for the Provision of Temporary Accommodation
tender.description:
a)	Lot 1 - Accommodation & Housing Management: The purpose of the services provided as part of this Lot are to supply good quality furnished temporary accommodation and housing management services to a range of households in housing need on behalf of the Council. This will include Homeless Single people, Couples, Families, and Care Leavers.
This could also include hotel rooms that would be used in exceptional circumstance. Hotels/ B&B provision would not usually be used for young people under the age of 18. Families would only be accommodated in exceptional circumstances. 
b)	Lot 2 - Accommodation Only: The purposes of services provided as part of this lot are to enable the Local Authority to lease accommodation (preferably furnished but unfurnished considered) in which they will place Homeless Single people, Couples, Families, Care Leavers. The Council will be responsible for the Housing Management of these properties.

tender.title: WNC Nightly Purchased Temporary Accommodation DPS - Award
tender.description:
This is the award notice to show successful suppliers on the DPS. it will be added to during the lifetime of the DPS.

West Northamptonshire Council requires well-managed, good quality self-contained temporary accommodation in its area, which is purchased on a nightly basis and managed by the housing supplier.

West Northamptonshire Council is implementing a Dynamic Purchasing System (DPS) to enable to the Council to ensure quality, value for money and an improved Temporary Accommodation service.

Please apply via the electronic Tendering System In-Tend.
https://in-tendhost.co.uk/wnc/aspx/Home

tender.title: Housing Related Support and Accommodation for 16-25 year olds in Somerset
tender.description:
The services required are aimed at young people aged 16 and above, with housing related support needs.  They may be homeless or threatened with homelessness and have a wide range of support needs. Service is split into 2 Lots:
Lot 1 - Supported Accommodation for 16-25 year old children in care and care leavers, including Emergency accommodation
Lot 2 - Supported Accommodation for 18-25 year olds who are homeless, eligible and reason to believe in priority need, incl. Emergency Accommodation.

tender.title: The Provision The Safe Place to Stay and Assess Accommodation Based Housing Related Support Service
tender.description:
Direct Award to deliver short term support within a supported accommodation setting to vulnerable adults (over 18) who are at risk of becoming homeless.

 The service will work closely with other homeless prevention services commissioned by Sandwell Council including Supported Housing for Single Adults services, SWEP and Housing First etc to reduce homelessness within the Borough

The Contractor shall work with Service Users, offering support to overcome barriers and develop skills which will enable them to source and sustain a permanent tenancy of their own in the following key areas and will be the basis for outcomes monitoring of the service: 

•	Motivation and Taking Responsibility
•	Self-care and living skills
•	Managing money and personal administration
•	Social networks and relationships
•	Drug and alcohol misuse
•	Physical health
•	Emotional and mental health
•	Meaningful use of time
•	Managing tenancy and accommodation
•	Offending
